info.name: CloudCampus — JNV Lucknow (v1)
info.description:
Full API collection — JNV Lucknow seed data.

**All passwords: Admin@123**

| Username | Role |
|---|---|
| superadmin | SUPER_ADMIN |
| schooladmin | SCHOOL_ADMIN |
| teacher1 | TEACHER (John Smith, Class 10) |
| student1 | STUDENT (Class 10-A) |
| parent1 | PARENT |

exec: if (j.success) { pm.environment.set('superToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('authToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('refreshToken', j.data.refreshToken); }
if (j.success) { pm.environment.set('schoolAdminToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('authToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('refreshToken', j.data.refreshToken); }
if (j.success) { pm.environment.set('teacherToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('authToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('refreshToken', j.data.refreshToken); }
if (j.success) { pm.environment.set('studentToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('authToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('refreshToken', j.data.refreshToken); }
if (j.success) { pm.environment.set('parentToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('authToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('refreshToken', j.data.refreshToken); }

request.description: KPIs: total students, attendance %, fee collection etc. Use schoolAdminToken.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "PTM \u2014 20 May 2026",
  "content": "Parent-Teacher Meeting at 10 AM in school hall.",
  "priority": "HIGH",
  "targetAudience": "ALL",
  "validUntil": "2026-05-20"
}
